{{Quote|These Shrieks, they don't offer the atmosphere any respect.|Han Solo to Wedge Antilles in 40 ABY|<ref name="Legacy of the Force: Betrayal">''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]''</ref>}}
The '''YT-5100 ''Shriek''-class bomber''' was a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] craft used in the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].

==Characteristics==
They were shaped like smaller [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighters]]. Their armaments included frontal torpedo tubes, [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]], a top-mounted [[Quad laser cannon/Legends|quad laser cannon]], and a bottom-mounted bomb/[[spotter droid]] drop pod.
They had three engines and were painted black. Their [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] wore green and black/white suits. At the time of their [[Battle of Tralus (Second Galactic Civil War)|first combat operation]], the ''Shriek''-class vessel was so new that Galactic Alliance sensors were unable to recognize it as anything other than a YT-series variant.

==History==
As of [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], only ten late-model prototypes and several earlier models existed. The [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] lacked intelligence on these bombers due to their novelty and the Corellians used that to their advantage. Several of them were organized into [[Panther Flight]] for the [[Battle of Tralus (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Tralus]], two of which were piloted by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]].

{{Ship-stub}}
